facebook.caption:
7,845 reviews. 4.8 stars. And you've probably never heard of MEO Kitchen.

This local Vietnamese spot on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where the crowd actually eats. Under $10 a person. Real food. No tourist markup.

While everyone else is queuing at the resort buffet, regulars are here ordering bowls that hit different.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch this bowl land on the table. Under $10. 7,845 people rated MEO Kitchen 4.8 stars and it's still flying under the radar. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Go.
